mapper.update: UPDATE guides g SET -- 点赞数：查 likes 表，target_type=4 like_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_type = 4 AND l.target_id = g.id ), collect_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM collections c WHERE c.target_type = 4 AND c.target_id = g.id ), comment_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments cm WHERE cm.target_type = 4 AND cm.target_id = g.id AND cm.status = 1 )
